pdf_font_unsupported: This PDF uses fonts that are not suitable for text extraction. Use a PDF with a text layer or run OCR first.
tounicode_missing: This PDF is missing ToUnicode mapping. Use a PDF with a text layer or run OCR first.
font_subset_corrupt: This PDF may have corrupt font subsets. Try re-exporting the PDF or run OCR first.
no_paragraphs: We couldn't find readable text to translate in this PDF. It may be scanned, image-only, or use a layout we don't fully support yet—this isn't your fault. We're actively improving support for these files in upcoming releases. Try "Preprocess with OCR" or a PDF where you can select text with the cursor.
ocr_preprocess_failed: OCR preprocessing failed. Ensure OCRmyPDF and Tesseract are installed, or try again later.
